\tzpentry{ID3862}{Switch Pressure Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3862 introduces Switch Pressure Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} P_{\mathrm{switch}}(s) = \frac{1}{1+\exp!\left[-\alpha\left(\pi(s-1)-\phi_c\right)\right]}, \end{equation}
